infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Daytripper needs your location to show you where hunt stops are and detect when you arrive.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Daytripper uses your location to track hunt progress.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Daytripper needs camera access to take photos at hunt stops.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Daytripper saves hunt photos to your photo library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Daytripper to use your location to detect your city for hunt generation.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Daytripper to use your location to detect your city for hunt generation.
